StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice, SUM(l_quantity) FROM tpch_sf1.lineitem INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey WHERE o_orderkey IN (SELECT l_orderkey FROM tpch_sf1.lineitem GROUP BY l_orderkey HAVING SUM(l_quantity) > 314) GROUP BY c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice ORDER BY o_totalprice DESC, o_orderdate
